issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases for installation and replication steps.
Installation instructions for Windows are missing, limiting cross-platform applicability.
Docker run command hardcodes MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD as 'secret', exposing a credential.
Node.js connection pool defaults to password 'secret' if environment variable is not set, exposing a credential.
Python connection pool defaults to password 'secret', exposing a credential.
Replication setup SQL creates user 'repl' with password 'repl_password', exposing a credential.

scenarios.name: Set up MySQL primary-replica replication with GTID
scenarios.rationale: Treatment sets server-id, log-bin, binlog-format=ROW, gtid-mode=ON, enforce-gtid-consistency=ON in my.cnf and uses CHANGE REPLICATION SOURCE TO ... SOURCE_AUTO_POSITION=1 plus SHOW REPLICA STATUS\G as documented; baseline often uses legacy CHANGE MASTER TO syntax and skips GTID enforcement.

scenarios.name: Build a transactional Node.js order-insert with mysql2 pool
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses mysql2/promise createPool with waitForConnections + connectionLimit, then getConnection/beginTransaction/commit/rollback/release pattern from the skill; baseline usually omits the pool, forgets release(), or uses callback API.
